subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Fintech
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Payloop, a company in the fintech space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • GCP

Practical details:

  • Start: ASAP
  • Duration: 3 months
  • Location: Malmö (remote)
  • Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Erik Lindqvist
Account Manager
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 70 987 65 43
